stat_block.text:
This *+4 major striking greater brilliant keen glaive* binds the souls of powerful creatures it slays. The soul can't be returned to life by any means while imprisoned within the glaive and can be freed only by a deed of great benevolence or selflessness. While using the glaive as a weapon, whenever you reduce a sapient creature of 18th level or higher to 0 Hit Points or roll a critical success with a Strike against such a target, the creature must attempt a DC 50 Fortitude save.  
   
 The glaive also has the following activations.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Artifact
traits.text: Items with this trait are artifacts. These magic items can't be crafted by normal means, and they can't be damaged by normal means. Artifacts are always rare or unique.

traits.name: Divine
traits.text:
This magic comes from the divine tradition, drawing power from deities or similar sources. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to divine magic.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.trigger: You Strike with the  *Whisperer of Souls*
abilities.effect: You choose whether the Strike deals lethal or nonlethal damage. If the glaive has a reason for doing so, such as slaying a creature whose soul the glaive can absorb, it can defy your choice if you fail a DC 50 Will save.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.trigger: You attempt an Occultism check to Decipher Writing , Identify Magic , Learn a Spell , or Recall Knowledge
abilities.effect: You listen to eldritch secrets the weapon whispers, gaining a +4 item bonus to the triggering check.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: Attempt an Occultism check as if you cast the legend lore ritual about a subject. If you roll a success or critical success, you can repeat what the  *Whisperer of Souls* relates to you about the subject. On a critical failure, you and the glaive are drawn into a murmuring void of cold, where your mind is assaulted by strange visions for an entire week. At the end of this time, you reappear and must attempt a DC 50 Will save.
abilities.success: When you return, you can retrain one of your skills into a Lore skill about evil creatures or places, as if you had spent 1 week retraining.
abilities.failure: As success, but you are stupefied 2 for 1 week.
abilities.critical_failure: As success, but you become unholy . If you were holy , you instead lose that trait. You must retrain one of your skills into a Lore about unholy creatures or places. You become obsessed with increasing your forbidden knowledge, turning to wicked forces that offer such secrets and compromising your morals further if you must.
abilities.destruction: If the  *Whisperer of Souls* is used to slay Shelyn's herald , it disintegrates, bringing about great evil in its wake.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

save_results.success:
The glaive siphons the creature's essence, rendering it 
drained 1
. If the creature dies from the Strike or while drained in this way, the creature's soul is bound in the glaive.
save_results.failure: As success, but the creature is drained 2.
save_results.critical_failure: As success, but the creature is drained 4.
